channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Israeli settlers kill 19-year-old Palestinian American, officials and witnesses say
item.description: The Palestinian Health Ministry and a witness say that Israeli settlers in the occupied West Bank shot and killed a Palestinian American in an attack on a village.

item.title: Crews hope to resume recovery of 8 bodies from California avalanche after days of dangerous weather
Snow drought helped set the stage for deadly California avalanche, leading to unstable conditions
